name: Tourtiere
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients except the bread crumbs and pastry in a saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil, then cook uncovered for 20 minutes over medium heat.
3. Remove from heat and add a few spoonfuls of bread crumbs. Let stand for 10 minutes.
4. If the fat is sufficiently absorbed by the bread crumbs, do not add more. If not, continue in the same manner.
5. Cool and pour into a pastry-lined pie pan. Cover with crust.
6. Bake at 400°F until golden brown. Serve hot. A cooked tourtiere can be frozen for 4-5 months. It does not have to be thawed before reheating.
